phases.label: Party Primaries
phases.description: Registered party members vote to select their party's nominee.
key_facts: Iowa and New Hampshire traditionally hold the first contests

phases.label: Election Day
phases.description: The official day when polling places open for in-person voting. Poll opening and closing times vary by state (typically 6:00 AM to 8:00 PM local time). Ensure you check your exact state ID requirements as around 36 states require some form of voter ID at the polls.
key_facts: Always the first Tuesday after the first Monday in November
Around 36 states require some form of ID to vote
Typical poll opening mapping: 6:00 AM to 8:00 PM local time
